subject: [SDC BE] Remove HTTP node port 30205
commit_message:
[SDC BE] Remove HTTP node port 30205

Keep HTTP port reachable from inside the server.

Issue-ID: OJSI-101

Signed-off-by: gummar <raj.gumma@est.tech>

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Does anyone use sdc be http port in scripts / robot?
As I know that we already have issues with unattended API changes, I don't want to add port removal on top of it...

Patch Set 1:

> Does anyone use sdc be http port in scripts / robot?
 > As I know that we already have issues with unattended API changes,
 > I don't want to add port removal on top of it...

My understanding is that NodePorts are for external network, the ports HTTP ports I believe are still exposed on the cluster IP.

Patch Set 1:

Yes, but:
* robot is "inside" the cluster and may still use the http port, that won't be here anymore with this patch
* some SDK may use http sdc-be http port and not the https and thus may need to update it.

My point here is more to highlight the change to person that may be impacted !
I'm not (at all) against the removal (that's why I've +1ed)
